calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-22-2026 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-22-2026 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: N. Webb; Not Reported.

Donald Sherrill, Esq. appeared on behalf of Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank N.A.
No appearance by Defendant Richard J Kunz.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank N.A and against Defendant Richard J Kunz.

Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank N.A is awarded judgment against Defendant Richard J Kunz, as follows:

Damages/Principal: $34,383.92
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Costs: $0
Total Judgment: $34,383.92

Proposed Judgment was submitted and signed by the Court. (D505/NW)
